name: Favorite Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Red kidney beans; drain, 16 oz each
1 Green pepper; seed and coarse chop
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, preferably non-stick saucepan, brown the chuck and drain off the fat.
2. Add the ground beef and other ingredients to a 3-1/2 to 4 quart crockpot. If you have a small crock pot, cut the recipe in half.
3. Stir well. Cover and cook on LOW for 10-12 hours.
